trigger_types.label: Manual
trigger_types.description: Run the automation only when an operator starts it.

trigger_types.label: Schedule
trigger_types.description: Start automatically at a set time each day.

trigger_types.label: Inbound API
trigger_types.description: Start when an inbound API endpoint receives an event.

trigger_types.label: SMTP email
trigger_types.description: Start when incoming email matches your filters.

step_types.label: Write
step_types.description: Write a row to a managed database table.

step_types.label: Connector action
step_types.description: Call a provider-aware action backed by a saved connector.

step_types.label: HTTP request
step_types.description: Send a custom or connector-backed HTTP request.

step_types.label: Script
step_types.description: Run a stored script from the script library.

step_types.label: Tool
step_types.description: Dispatch a configured tool from the tool catalog.

step_types.label: Condition
step_types.description: Evaluate a guard expression and optionally halt the automation.

step_types.label: LLM chat
step_types.description: Prompt a language model with workflow context.

storage_types.label: Database table
storage_types.description: Write rows into a managed log table.

storage_types.label: CSV file
storage_types.description: Append rows to a CSV file target.

storage_types.label: JSON file
storage_types.description: Write structured JSON output to a file target.

storage_types.label: Other
storage_types.description: Write to another file-backed target identifier.
